svg.text: One villager's mind — three layers, fast to slow
REFLEXES — instant, in the body (Godot, every frame)

g.text: • a wolf inside threat range → drop everything, run to the fire
• hunger ≥ 85 with food in the pouch → eat (not knowledge — even blank emergent minds don't starve holding berries)

svg.text: SURVIVAL INSTINCT — the scripted suggestion (Cortex, no LLM call)

g.text: priority ladder: eat/withdraw/milk when starving → tend the fire → rest at night → collect copper → shelter →
store/farm/herd/furnace duties → talk → craft something new → wander. Chases missing materials recursively.
vanilla: offered to the LLM as SUGGESTED_ACTION + fallback for invalid answers · emergent: never offered (fallback = wander)

svg.text: THE MIND — full LLM decide (every 5–15 s per villager)

g.text: persona (HEXACO traits → prose) + mood + relationships + retrieved memories + today's council plan
+ the action catalog (only what is truly possible right now) + named routines (skill library)
discovers techs (insight · practice · opportunity) · composes routines · speaks · everything social
